force_mppt_reacquire.name: Force MPPT reacquire
force_mppt_reacquire.description: Experimental: briefly halts PV production (by temporarily lowering the power-component temperature limit) to provoke a fresh MPPT sweep. Rate-limited to once per minute.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Epever controller to toggle. May be omitted when only one is set up.

off_seconds.name: Off time
off_seconds.description: How long production stays halted before the limit is restored.
